case_title: ERNEST CHEN VS. MAKSYM POTOTSKYI ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ERNEST CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR URSOL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAKSYM POTOTSKY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, ERNEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POTOTSKYI, MAKSYM URSOL, VIKTOR $990.30 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,185.30, LOSS OF USE RATE $109.07 X 18 DAYS = $1963.26, LESS AMOUNT ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF $972.95, BALANCE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF $990.30. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85.00) SERVED MAY-06-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT URSOL, VIKTOR
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,717.06 FILED BY CHEN, ERNEST AS TO DEFENDANT POTOTSKYI, MAKSYM URSOL, VIKTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED APR-29-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT POTOTSKYI, MAKSYM
